TUM.headline: The model's 'TUM' call is distributed. Deleting the 160 features it uses drops its confidence from 1.00 to 0.55; deleting 160 RANDOM features only drops it to 0.95. Even 160 features do not overturn the call — the model has many independent routes to this conclusion, so no single piece of morphology is load-bearing.
TUM.should_i_trust_it: The belief is highly redundant — it survives deleting hundreds of features. That means it is ROBUST, but also that it cannot be traced to specific morphology: there is no small set of features to inspect.
TUM.morphology: The tiles that most drive the model's 'TUM' decision are TUM 100%. Open the evidence card and judge whether that is the morphology you would expect. If it is not, the answer is suspect regardless of how confident the model is.
TUM.not_noise: Every ablation is compared against deleting the same NUMBER of random features. Random: 1.00 -> 0.95 (drop 0.05). Concept features: 1.00 -> 0.55 (drop 0.45).
TUM.intervention: Feature directions projected out of every token at every block 27-39 of H-Optimus-0. 12 transformer blocks execute after the edit, so this is a causal intervention on the model's computation, not a linear attribution.

LYM.headline: The model's 'LYM' call is sparse. Deleting the 160 features it uses drops its confidence from 1.00 to 0.25; deleting 160 RANDOM features only drops it to 0.97. Only 20 features are needed to overturn the call entirely — so this answer rests on a small, inspectable set of visual features.
LYM.should_i_trust_it: The evidence is concentrated and checkable: look at the exemplar tiles for the few features driving it, and if they are not the morphology you expect, the answer is suspect.
LYM.morphology: The tiles that most drive the model's 'LYM' decision are LYM 100%. Open the evidence card and judge whether that is the morphology you would expect. If it is not, the answer is suspect regardless of how confident the model is.
LYM.not_noise: Every ablation is compared against deleting the same NUMBER of random features. Random: 1.00 -> 0.97 (drop 0.02). Concept features: 1.00 -> 0.25 (drop 0.75).
